queries.name: list_literal_access
queries.cypher: RETURN list_element([10, 20, 30], 1) AS second, list_len([10, 20, 30]) AS len

queries.name: list_concat_and_contains
queries.cypher: RETURN list_element(list_concat([1, 2], [3, 4]), 3) AS fourth, list_contains([1, 2, 3, 4], 2) AS has_two

queries.name: struct_extract_scalar
queries.cypher: RETURN struct_extract(struct_pack('name', 'alice', 'age', 30), 'name') AS name, struct_extract(struct_pack('name', 'alice', 'age', 30), 'age') AS age

queries.name: struct_keys_sorted
queries.cypher: UNWIND keys(struct_pack('name', 'alice', 'age', 30, 'city', 'la')) AS k RETURN k ORDER BY k

queries.name: unwind_list_of_structs
queries.cypher: UNWIND [struct_pack('name', 'alice', 'score', 10), struct_pack('name', 'bob', 'score', 20)] AS s RETURN struct_extract(s, 'name') AS name, struct_extract(s, 'score') AS score ORDER BY score

queries.name: unwind_list_of_maps
queries.cypher: UNWIND [map(['id', 'name'], [1, 'a']), map(['id', 'name'], [2, 'b'])] AS m RETURN list_element(map_extract(m, 'id'), 0) AS id, list_element(map_extract(m, 'name'), 0) AS name ORDER BY id

queries.name: nested_map_list_access
queries.cypher: WITH map(['tags'], [[ 'red', 'blue' ]]) AS m RETURN list_element(list_element(map_extract(m, 'tags'), 0), 1) AS second_tag

queries.name: struct_literal_extract
queries.cypher: RETURN struct_extract({name:'alice', age:30}, 'name') AS name, struct_extract({name:'alice', age:30}, 'age') AS age

queries.name: struct_literal_keys
queries.cypher: UNWIND keys({name:'alice', age:30, city:'la'}) AS k RETURN k ORDER BY k

queries.name: quantifier_truth_table
queries.cypher: RETURN ALL(x IN [1, 2, 3] WHERE x > 0) AS all_positive, ANY(x IN [1, 2, 3] WHERE x = 2) AS any_two, NONE(x IN [1, 2, 3] WHERE x < 0) AS none_negative, SINGLE(x IN [1, 2, 3] WHERE x = 2) AS single_two, ALL(x IN [] WHERE x > 0) AS all_empty, ANY(x IN [] WHERE x > 0) AS any_empty, NONE(x IN [] WHERE x > 0) AS none_empty, SINGLE(x IN [] WHERE x > 0) AS single_empty
